parameters: Orc Priest: Now, please say your vows.

I vow to love Risa-san for my entire life and to
protect her no matter what.

I vow to love \V[3]-san for my entire life and to
support him no matter what.

Mom, that dress suits you. You look incredibly
beautiful...

\V[3], do you remember? It's about when you were
little...
"When I grow up, I'm going to marry mommy!"

You said that... I never thought we'd actually get
married\i[12]

I remember. I've always loved you, Mom... I just
couldn't give up.

It feels like a dream and I'm so happy... but the
thought that it might just be a dream is a little
scary.
Then... let me prove it's not a dream\i[12]

Mom brings her face closer... Her large eyes are moist
and shining...
I share a vow's kiss with Mom...

And so, we became mother and son as husband and
wife...

Even if we're blood-related parent and child, we're
still a man and a woman... As long as there's love, it
doesn't matter.
It wasn't a dream, was it...\i[12]
You were so dignified and cool...\i[12] But...

Make sure to make your mom happy, okay? You mom-con
son...\i[12]

O-of course! I'll do my best... (I have a feeling I'm
going to be henpecked...)

A nighttime event "Want to Mate for Making a Baby" has
been added now that the mother-son relationship has
become a married couple!

As a wedding gift, we received a private property east
of the town!

You can get pregnant if you meet the conditions: 1.
Eat the fruit from the legendary tree 2. Mate for
making a baby more than 5 times 3. Prepare a new home
